async def ceotest2_cmd(update, context):
 await update.message.reply_text("✅ /ceotest2 command working from AutoPilot Hub!")

app.add_handler(CommandHandler("ceotest2", ceotest2_cmd))

app.run_polling(drop_pending_updates=True)
